payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial dark matte metal fireplace surround with a rectangular viewing opening and decorative molded frame; interior appears deep black with possible soot/ash and a reflective glass door, crop shows the left/center of the unit and the camera appears approximately 0.8 m away.

message.content: {"label":"fireplace","short_description":"dark metal fireplace opening, edge-cropped","long_description":"Partial dark matte metal fireplace surround with a rectangular viewing opening and decorative molded frame; interior appears deep black with possible soot/ash and a reflective glass door, crop shows the left/center of the unit and the camera appears approximately 0.8 m away.","attributes":["dark matte metal surround","rectangular opening","deep black interior","possible glass door/reflection","decorative molding on frame","narrow metal base strip","soot/ash residue visible","edge-cropped/partial"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
